message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

title 迭代器模式

interface Aggregate {
  +Iterator iterator()
}

interface Iterator {
  +boolean hasNext()
  +T next()
}

class BookShelf {
  +BookIterator iterator()
}

class BookIterator {
  -BookShelf bookShelf
  +boolean hasNext()
  +Book next()
}

Aggregate ..> Iterator : Creates
BookShelf ..|> Aggregate
BookIterator ..|> Iterator
BookShelf o-- BookIterator

note top of Aggregate
集合，用于创建Iterator迭代器接口
end note

note bottom of BookShelf
会创建出具体的Iterator角色
end note

note bottom of BookIterator
具体的迭代器，
包含了遍历集合所必须的信息（bookShelf）
end note
@enduml
```
